title: Teltonika TRB140 4G/LTE Ethernet IoT Gateway
description: Small and quick to deploy industrial Ethernet to 4G LTE IoT gateway. Advanced VPN functionality, security and remote management capabilities makes TRB140 the best option for single device connectivity TRB140 LTE Ethernet Gateway is a small, lightweight and energy efficient IoT device equipped with mission-critical LTE capabilities, a RJ45 10/100/1000 Mbps port and a Linux environment offering a high degree of customization, designed to do IoT projects with ease Device LTE antenna with cable Power adapter (EU) USB cable Patch cable
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency LTE, 2G (GSM), 3G (GSM), 4G (GSM) Type of antenna Detachable Detachable antennas 1 Integrated 4G/LTE radio part Yes 4G/LTE bands support (1) 2100 MHz, (3) 1800 MHz, (7) 2600 MHz, (8) 900 MHz, (20) 800 MHz, (38) 2600 MHz, (40) 2300 MHz,… Connectors and Interfaces RF connectors (1) SMA female LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps SIM slot Yes SIM slots quantity 1 USB Yes Power Power over Ethernet 9 .. 30V DC Power type 4-pin automotive PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 5 Power via connector/terminal 9 .. 30V DC Physical characteristics Protection class IP30 Design Desktop Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 75 Weight [g] 134 Width [mm] 75 Height [mm] 25 Depth [mm] 65 Hardware CPU ARM Cortex A7 CPU frequency [MHz] 1200 Internal storage [MB] 512 RAM [MB] 128
